title: alangium barbatum subsp. typicum
intro: Alangium barbatum subsp. typicum, a species of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae, is also known as the 'Chinese Parasol Tree' or 'Kokkuri'. The plant is used in traditional medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Alangium barbatum subsp. typicum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
